comment: Per-coin metadata for the 23 C0iNS Coin Vault viewer. Grounded in NoDataFound/23Coins (real-world repo) — see docs/phase5_pwnglove_coins_priority.md + docs/phase5_canonical_pins_and_coin_vault.md

dialog.grid_highlight: Coin Zero. Minted on first visit. Phrase locked. Coin One waiting. Let's see what it wants.
dialog.closeup: Twenty-three. The number SecKC chose. Year I started cracking BBSes.
dialog.linger: Lloyd Blankenship would've appreciated this. Mentor's manifesto, '86.

dialog.grid_highlight: Coin One. Phone dial. Phreaker shit. The border text rotates — that's a Bacon cipher or I'm an idiot.
dialog.closeup: The face in the middle. Some kind of grinning Bond villain. Probably means something.
dialog.linger: AABBB ABBAB AAABB. That's letters. Need to decode it.

dialog.grid_highlight: Coin Two. This one's a fucking maze. Speak & Spell, Vegas, Francis Bacon, text adventure. What is this?
dialog.closeup: PBEL. That's PBEL backwards. Or anagrammed. Or both.
dialog.linger: 'Suddenly you are standing in the cavern that is the evil mind of PBEL.' Zork meets paranoid hacker fiction.
dialog.long_linger: I lived here too long. Speak & Spell knows what I'm talking about.

dialog.grid_highlight: Coin Three. Yoda. With a hash tattoo. Sure.
dialog.closeup: 1QZ9M9G3E6WXK7. That's 14 chars. Bitcoin-style address compression? Or it spells something.
dialog.linger: Marching ants on the cheek. Probably nothing. Probably everything.

dialog.grid_highlight: 2600Hz tone. Trunk seize. Phreaker scripture.
dialog.closeup: Cap'n Crunch whistle. They put him in jail for this.
dialog.linger: Free long distance was a felony. Worth it.

dialog.grid_highlight: Department of Defense crypto specs. Banned import.
dialog.closeup: Department of Defense crypto specs. Banned import.
dialog.linger: Phrase not yet discovered. Walk the BBS, find the hint.

dialog.grid_highlight: The Mentor's manifesto issue. 'This is our world now.'
dialog.closeup: The Mentor's manifesto issue. 'This is our world now.'
dialog.linger: Phrase not yet discovered. Walk the BBS, find the hint.
